series_metadata.series_description: Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source. Also used to establish departmental holding funds. Both paper and electronic files.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper receipts are retained in the fiscal office for a period of (1) year, transferred offsite and retained for (1) year then shred. ; Electronic: Electronic receipts are electronically stored through the State of Ohio OAKS FIN database indefinitely., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
